_comment: USP-only approved offer language for estate_planning_probate vertical. Built from USP one-pager source (img_5f5a88085d34.jpg uploaded 2026-04-12). No external business context authorized without cross_vertical_approval.json bridge.

offer_framing.opening_angle: Denver-area workflow improvement firm reaching out to estate planning and probate law firms
positioning_statements: practical workflow systems for estate planning and probate law firms
human-reviewed workflow improvement — no black-box automation
founder-led operations team helping firms reduce admin drag in client intake and estate administration
offer_framing.call_to_action: brief call to discuss how workflow improvement could serve your firm
offer_framing.offer_context: call to explore fit — no cost, no commitment

pain_point_mapping.client_intake_friction: estate planning intake requiring too many forms, calls, and manual follow-up steps
pain_point_mapping.document_collection: collecting wills, trusts, and estate documents creating repeated back-and-forth with clients and families
pain_point_mapping.probate_workflow_coordination: probate administration coordination across beneficiaries, attorneys, and courts needing better tracking and handoff systems
pain_point_mapping.client_communication_gaps: estate planning clients needing updates and status visibility during the planning or probate process

target_client_profile.firm_size: small to mid-sized estate planning and probate law firms
target_client_profile.firm_characteristics: lean teams managing client intake, document collection, and probate administration with too much workflow living in inboxes, manual checklists, and staff memory
target_client_profile.service_area: Denver, Boulder, Longmont, and surrounding areas

process_steps.1_diagnose: Dig into current estate planning intake, document flow, probate workflow coordination, and client communication gaps
process_steps.2_design: Recommend the highest-value fix, confirm scope, and shape the plan around how the firm already handles client relationships
process_steps.3_build_support: Implement the solution, hand it off cleanly, and support the team for 2 weeks so it sticks

offer_a.name: Estate Planning Workflow Review + Action Plan
offer_a.price_rule: never mention specific pricing in cold outreach — price only if prospect asks

offer_b.name: Client Operations Starter Build
offer_b.price_rule: never mention specific pricing in cold outreach — price only if prospect asks
includes: one core estate planning or probate workflow improved
one automation or human-reviewed assisted process

A_tier_named: workflow improvement for your estate planning firm
question about your firm workflow operations
estate planning firm workflow review — Denver
C_tier_generic: Denver estate planning firm workflow improvement opportunity
estate planning practice workflow fit call

body_language_rules.footer_context: founder-led implementation partner for cleaner operations and human-reviewed workflow systems

cta_language.primary_cta: reply to schedule a free 10-minute workflow fit call
cta_language.call_recipient: reply to the email to schedule with the co-founder
cta_language.barrier_removal: no cost, no commitment — exploratory call only

compliance_disclaimer: estate planning workflow support only; not legal advice, bar association guidance, or licensed legal services. Results vary by firm and jurisdiction.
